templates.template: select * from PA_Adm;

SELECT * from DHCDocIPBooking;
select * from DHCDocIPBDictory;
select * from DHCDoc_ErrCodeRegister;

select * from Ens_InterfaceMethod;
SELECT * from Doc_InterfaceMethod;
select ${col:column(table)},count(*) from ${table} t group by ${col};
select count(*) from ${table};
select * from ${table};
select * from ${table} t order by ${column};
select * from ${table} where ${column}='${value}';
